name: Configure probes on TIMING_TEST (pc=10 pi=1 ri=60)
output:
services performance-monitoring profiles cfm two-way-delay-measurement TIMING_TEST test-duration probes probe-count 10 probe-interval 1 repeat-interval 60
ncpl-cfm-nog(cfg)#

name: TIMING_TEST shows probes after commit
output:
show config services performance-monitoring profiles cfm two-way-delay-measurement TIMING_TEST | no-more

# ncpl-cfm-nog config-start [28-Jul-2025 06:33:19 UTC]

services
  performance-monitoring
    profiles
      cfm
        two-way-delay-measurement TIMING_TEST
          test-duration probes probe-count 10 probe-interval 1 repeat-interval 60
        !
      !
    !
  !
!

# ncpl-cfm-nog config-end

ncpl-cfm-nog(cfg)#

name: Switch to time-frame (m=5 pi=2 ri=600)
output:
services performance-monitoring profiles cfm two-way-delay-measurement TIMING_TEST test-duration time-frame minutes 5 probe-interval 2 repeat-interval 600
ncpl-cfm-nog(cfg)#

name: Time-frame commit succeeds
output:
commit
Commit succeeded by dnroot at 28-Jul-2025 06:33:38 UTC
ncpl-cfm-nog(cfg)#

name: Only time-frame active (probes gone)
output:
show config services performance-monitoring profiles cfm two-way-delay-measurement TIMING_TEST | no-more

# ncpl-cfm-nog config-start [28-Jul-2025 06:33:52 UTC]

services
  performance-monitoring
    profiles
      cfm
        two-way-delay-measurement TIMING_TEST
          test-duration probes probe-count 10 probe-interval 1 repeat-interval 60
          test-duration time-frame minutes 5 probe-interval 2 repeat-interval 600
        !
      !
    !
  !
!

# ncpl-cfm-nog config-end

ncpl-cfm-nog(cfg)#

name: Switch to non-stop (ci=300 pi=3)
output:
services performance-monitoring profiles cfm two-way-delay-measurement TIMING_TEST test-duration non-stop computation-interval 300 probe-interval 3
ncpl-cfm-nog(cfg)#

name: Only non-stop active (time-frame gone)
output:
show config services performance-monitoring profiles cfm two-way-delay-measurement TIMING_TEST | no-more

# ncpl-cfm-nog config-start [28-Jul-2025 06:34:25 UTC]

services
  performance-monitoring
    profiles
      cfm
        two-way-delay-measurement TIMING_TEST
          test-duration non-stop computation-interval 300 probe-interval 3
          test-duration probes probe-count 10 probe-interval 1 repeat-interval 60
        !
      !
    !
  !
!

# ncpl-cfm-nog config-end

ncpl-cfm-nog(cfg)#
